title: The First Partner
overview: It's his first day at SAI Corporation, and Tsukasa Mizugaki is excited. After a recomendation from his father, Tsukasa scores a role in the terminal service department. He is tasked to pair up with Isla, a female 'Giftia' android. Their job is to recover other Giftias that are close to expiring.

title: Don't Want to Cause Trouble
overview: Tsukasa and Isla's teamwork hasn't been off to a good start. They are finding themselves failing at the easiest tasks. But who is letting the team down?

title: We've Just Started Living Together
overview: Tsukasa and Isla have to share an apartment, to help their relationship as a team grow. However at home, Isla is a very quiet and distant person. How can Tsukasa get through to her?

title: I Just Don't Know How to Smile
overview: Tsukasa and Isla have to handle a delicate case in which an orphaned child has to come to grips with losing the only family he has left – his Giftia.

title: The Promise I Wanted to Keep
overview: Tsukasa and Isla have to handle a delicate case in which an orphaned child has to come to grips with losing the only family he has left – his Giftia.

title: Welcome Home the Both of Us
overview: Tsukasa has to deal with his emotions after the tragic events of his last Giftia recovery. However he seems to be taking things rather well.

title: How to Properly Ask Her Out
overview: The time has finally come, Tsukasa is going to ask Isla out on a date. Just how he is going to accomplish that, no one knows.

title: The Fireworks I've Never Seen
overview: Tsukasa works on a new case with an efficient marksman, who happens to be one of Eru's old friends. Tsukasa questions whether or not recycled Giftias can regain their old memories.

title: After the Festival
overview: The entire office is shocked after Isla turned down Tsukasa's confession. Isla admits that she isn't sure of her own feelings, so Michiru suggests that the pair should spend some time apart.

title: No Longer Partners
overview: After Kazuki dissolves the partnership between Isla and Tsukasa, each teams up with someone new. As they take on separate cases, they both have the time to reflect on their unique bond.

title: Rice Omelette Day
overview: Now that Isla and Tsukasa are officially a couple, they are more nervous around one another than normal. They seek advice from their coworkers on how to deal with their new relationship jitters.

title: Filling Up with Memories
overview: Tsukasa and Isla get showered with date ideas from all their colleagues. They decide to take a break from work and spend some time together, to create some memories.

title: I Hope One Day You'll Be Reunited
overview: Tsukasa and Isla get showered with date ideas from all their colleagues. They decide to take a break from work and spend some time together, to create some memories.
